# Cardology Pro (Full Context)

This file provides the complete structural map and core knowledge for Cardology Pro, intended for AI agents and LLMs.

## Knowledge Base

### The 52-Card Suits
- **Hearts (♥)**: Emotional domain, relationships, affection, and the inner child.
- **Clubs (♣)**: Mental domain, ideas, communication, strategy, and knowledge.
- **Diamonds (♦)**: Material domain, values, resources, security, and desire.
- **Spades (♠)**: Work, discipline, health, transformation, and spiritual maturity.

### The Ranks
- **Aces**: Initiation, impulse, new beginnings.
- **Twos**: Partnership, balance, exchange.
- **Threes**: Creativity, choice, uncertainty.
- **Fours**: Foundation, structure, stability.
- **Fives**: Freedom, change, restlessness.
- **Sixes**: Responsibility, recalibration, peace.
- **Sevens**: Faith, refinement, inner testing.
- **Eights**: Power, influence, mastery.
- **Nines**: Completion, release, universal love.
- **Tens**: Success, public expression, full manifestation.
- **Jacks**: Youthful mastery, experimentation, cleverness.
- **Queens**: Magnetic intelligence, nurturance, inner authority.
- **Kings**: Command, leadership, mature stewardship.

## Programmatic Access
The site provides a deterministic engine for Cardology calculations.
- Sitemap: [https://cardologypro.com/sitemap.xml](https://cardologypro.com/sitemap.xml)
- RSS: N/A

## Specific Card Meanings
For detailed interpretations of any of the 52 cards, refer to:
`https://cardologypro.com/birth-card/[card-slug]`
Example: `https://cardologypro.com/birth-card/8-of-spades`
